sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check the bottom bar progress
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
bottom_row = ascii_lines[63]
white_count = bottom_row.count('W')
gray_count = bottom_row.count('G')
print(f"Bottom bar: {gray_count} gray, {white_count} white, total={len(bottom_row)}")
print(f"Progress: {white_count/len(bottom_row)*100:.1f}%")

# Check if there are any S (sky blue) objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
sky_blue = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
print(f"\nSky blue objects: {len(sky_blue)}")
for n in sky_blue:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Try clicking on the yellow box
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 24}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
